webapp.verification_strategy: resolve the platform-specific registry manifest digest before apply, record it in installer state, and reuse that digest on rerun

guacd.verification_strategy: resolve the platform-specific registry manifest digest before apply, record it in installer state, and reuse that digest on rerun

postgresql.verification_strategy: resolve the platform-specific registry manifest digest before apply, record it in installer state, and reuse that digest on rerun

steps: Download the artifact, detached .asc signature, .sha256 manifest, and Apache Guacamole KEYS over HTTPS into a private temporary directory.
Verify that the manifest filename and checksum exactly match this reviewed lock, then verify the downloaded artifact against that SHA-256 digest.
Import KEYS into a temporary isolated keyring and verify the detached OpenPGP signature; do not use a public keyserver during installation.
Review and pin release-manager fingerprints out of band before unattended production use.
Delete temporary keyrings and artifacts on failure, and never continue after a verification error.
verification.note: Artifact checksums are copied from the official Apache 1.6.0 SHA-256 manifests. No OCI digest is embedded because platform-specific image digests were not independently verified; they may be pinned only by a reviewed release update.
